title: EU Grants 24 Million Euros to Advance North Africa-Europe Hydrogen Link
content: The EU awarded â‚¬24 million in grants to Snam for the Italian H2 Backbone project, part of the larger SoutH2 Corridor, which aims to bring hydrogen from North Africa to Europe. This financing will support engineering and environmental studies for the 1,900 km pipeline, a significant portion of which will convert existing gas infrastructure. The SoutH2 Corridor, targeting 4 million tons of hydrogen import capacity, is a joint effort by Snam, Bayernets and other transmission system operators.
author: Analysts Account
